claims.summary: Narrative evidence should distinguish direction, curvature, persistence, waiting potential, and process rather than only magnitude.
claims.disposition: verify narrative split, four-point curvature, dynamics, headroom, and latent-stasis tests

claims.summary: Semantic projection and clamp diagnostics should show which warmth, texture, narrative, and tail lanes were preserved or flattened.
claims.disposition: verify semantic-projection texture, delivery-lane, clamp, and experience-delta evidence

claims.summary: Expanding the live vector, changing reserved dimensions, or applying narrative or texture gain would alter codec transport.
claims.disposition: gate behind exact Mike/operator Tier 5 approval
claims.authority: No live codec vector, reserved-dimension, projection, transport, or gain change is authorized.
